div.head: The Ambassador in Cuba (Guggenheim) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 155. At reopening of University yesterday morning students were permitted to hold mass meeting without molestation by authorities. Leaders incited attack upon administration building following which group marched without permit toward center of city for purpose of arousing students at normal school and institute. One of the police who were attempting to stop demonstration killed by unknown person. All students arrested were released last night.
